prompt: pnpm dev --host gives me a turbo error, can we just get things running and test?

assertions.text: Explains that turbo doesn't accept --host as a flag
Provides correct fix: pnpm --filter @slide-maker/web dev -- --host 0.0.0.0 or equivalent
Proceeds to QA testing after addressing the startup error
At least smoke-level testing is executed (health, auth, one resource GET)
